Message:
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local LocalPlayer = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer
local Remote = game:GetService("StarterPack"):FindFirstChild("PaintBucket", true):WaitForChild("Remotes"):WaitForChild("ServerControls")

local OldNamecall
OldNamecall = hookmetamethod(game, "__namecall", function(self, ...)
    local Args = {...}
    local Method = getnamecallmethod()
    
    if self == Remote and Method == "InvokeServer" and Args[1] == "PaintPart" then
        return self:InvokeServer(unpack(Args))
    end
    
    return OldNamecall(self, ...)
end)

task.spawn(function()
    while true do
        task.wait(0.01)
        if LocalPlayer:FindFirstChild("PlayerGui") then
            local Mouse = LocalPlayer:GetMouse()
            if Mouse.Button1Pressed then
                Remote:InvokeServer("PaintPart", {
                    ["Part"] = Mouse.Target,
                    ["Color"] = BrickColor.new("White").Color 
                }, "Peace")
            end
        end
    end
end)
